---
title: "Trucktrack: how"
author: "Jesse Tweedle"
date: today
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
lightbox: auto
---

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![1](figures/slide-1.png){group="how"}

![2](figures/slide-2.png){group="how"}

![3](figures/slide-3.png){group="how"}

![4](figures/slide-4.png){group="how"}

![5](figures/slide-5.png){group="how"}

![6](figures/slide-6.png){group="how"}
:::
